content:
💡 CF-Hero | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Discovering the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-source intelligence gathering • DNS reconnaissance (current and historical) • Associated domain discovery • Integration with search engines (ZoomEye, Censys, Shodan) • Utilizes SecurityTrails historical records
📖 Summary: CF-Hero is a Go-based reconnaissance tool designed to uncover the origin IP addresses of web applications protected by Cloudflare. It leverages multiple intelligence sources and DNS reconnaissance techniques to identify and validate potential origin IPs, aiming to bypass Cloudflare's protection.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
